goal: Add a renderer-neutral node resize planner, prove origin/extent constraints where stable, add conformance/template traces, and close the lane without adding renderer or DOM dependencies to the headless crates.
checkpoints: after JNR-020 minimal resize planner tests pass
after JNR-030 origin/extent tests or split decisions pass
after JNR-050 package closeout gates pass
side_effect_policy: User authorized autonomous commits in this session; commit only verified bounded work, do not push, and do not revert unrelated user changes.
stop_conditions: renderer, DOM, d3, wgpu, egui, Fret, screenshot, or pixel dependency becomes necessary inside jellyflow-core or jellyflow-runtime
resize interface requires schema migration instead of existing Node.size and policy fields
exact XyFlow NodeResizer UI parity broadens the runtime contract
result: Completed renderer-neutral target-size resize planning, direction/origin handling, conformance/template coverage, docs, and closeout with pointer-resize extent parity split for future adapter evidence.
